query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Peter Schiff Says Trump's Iran War Ended Where It Started, Only With Higher Oil Prices
articles.description: Peter Schiff criticizes Trump's handling of Iran war, decrying massive spending, as well as the loss of lives and property damage.

articles.title: 'Coordinated Controversy': Oil Minister Hardeep Singh Puri Questions Push Back Against Ethanol Blended Fuel
articles.description: Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri defended India’s ethanol blending programme amid criticism over E20 petrol, saying the fuel has been used for nearly two years without major issues. He highlighted reduced crude import dependence, energy security benefits, lower emissions and support for farmers, while calling the criticism a coordinated controversy

articles.title: E20 petrol row: Hardeep Puri says controversy was ‘manufactured’ after E85 launch
articles.description: Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri says that E20 has been available for nearly two years and said the recent backlash followed the June 5 launch of E85 flex-fuel vehicles.

articles.title: Global Markets: Japan's Nikkei rebounds as AI shares gain, oil tempers broader mood
articles.description: Japan's Nikkei share average rebounded on Thursday after a three-day losing streak. AI-related shares tracked gains in the U.S. technology sector, boosting the index. Higher oil prices, however, kept investor optimism in check following renewed U.S.-Iran hostilities. The Nikkei 225 index climbed 1.4% to close at 67,743.85 points. Market breadth was negative as gains were skewed by heavily weighted stocks.

articles.title: Hero cop saved man from fireball injuries and disastrous blaze at petrol station
articles.description: Sgt Charlie Thompson spang into action having spotted a person from setting fire to himself in Stratford

articles.title: Rupee slips 4 paise to 95.52 against U.S. dollar in early trade
articles.description: Rupee falls to 95.52 against the dollar amid rising crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions in West Asia.

articles.title: Hormuz Tanker Traffic Grinds to a Halt After U.S.-Iran Escalation
articles.description: Renewed U.S.-Iran military clashes have sharply reduced tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices higher and renewing fears of supply disruptions.

articles.title: High crude, weak rupee likely to push OMCs into Q1FY27 losses despite record refining margins: Report
articles.description: India's oil marketing companies (OMCs) are likely to report losses in the first quarter of FY2026-27 as elevated crude oil prices, a weaker rupee and inventory losses outweighed the benefit of record refining margins, according to a report by Equirus Securities.

articles.title: Fiery Collision: Petrol Truck Crash Ignites Massive Blaze Near Bengaluru
articles.description: A petrol tanker crash in Bengaluru Rural district caused a major fire, engulfing a nearby milk truck. Both drivers escaped unhurt. The incident disrupted traffic temporarily as emergency teams extinguished the blaze. In a separate mishap, six died in a Karnataka truck collision.

articles.title: Oil prices rise, stocks fall after ceasefire said ‘over’
articles.description: NEW YORK -- Oil prices rose, and stock markets dropped in shaky trading worldwide Wednesday after President Donald Trump raised doubts about the temporary truce in the war with Iran.
